top_communities.title: gRPC A/B Experiment Service Handlers and Metadata Enforcement

top_communities.title: Account/Authorization Contracts and Service Behavior Tests for Feature-Flag and Promo Rules
top_communities.summary: This cluster spans identity and error contract models (`Role`, `Error`) plus Go rule execution/voucher preparation utilities used in promo decision workflows.

top_communities.title: Cross-service user, feature-flag, activity, and experiment orchestration
